hero.title: About AICTiG
hero.subtitle: The African Institute for Cybersecurity and Tele-Informatics Governance (AICTiG) is a research think tank and educational institution promoting cutting-edge research on policy, legal and regulatory issues affecting Cybersecurity and ICTs in Africa.

about.title: About the Institute
about.paragraph1: The African Institute for Cybersecurity and Tele-Informatics Governance (AICTiG) is an independent research think tank and educational institution licensed to promote, conduct and disseminate cutting-edge research on policy, legal and regulatory issues affecting Cybersecurity and Information Communications Technologies (ICTs) within the African region.
about.paragraph2: AICTiG adopts a multidisciplinary approach to produce policy-oriented research and its focus areas include the governance of artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, cybercrime, telecommunications, critical infrastructure protection, cryptocurrencies, data protection, digital rights, digital identity, digital trade, electronic commerce, taxation of digital services, ICT for development (ICT4D) and regional integration.
about.paragraph3: The Institute conducts training and education programs on the governance of ICTs and cybersecurity with the aim of building capacity in the African region, and renders consultancy services for national and international organizations, and private sector organizations.
about.incorporation: AICTiG is incorporated as a Company Limited by Guarantee by the Corporate Affairs Commission of the Federal Republic of Nigeria in 2025.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To position AICTiG as a leading institution for cutting-edge, evidence-based research and education on the governance of cybersecurity and ICTs in Africa.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.intro: AICTiG's mission encompasses multiple strategic objectives such as promoting capacity building for the governance of cybersecurity and ICTs in Africa; and providing an African regional platform for the conduct and dissemination of research on emerging issues affecting the governance of cybersecurity and ICTs.

research.title: Research Dissemination
research.description: Conducting and disseminating high-quality, policy-oriented research on cybersecurity and ICT governance

repository.title: Policy Creation
repository.description: Supporting the development and curation of policy documents, legislation, and implementation guidance to assist governments and institutions.

capacity.title: Capacity Building
capacity.description: Delivering training and education programs to strengthen regional expertise

publications.title: Publications
publications.description: Publishing journals, policy briefs, blogs, and thought leadership content

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the experts driving our mission forward

meta.title: About AICTiG - African Institute for Cybersecurity & Tele-Informatics Governance
meta.description: Learn about AICTiG's mission to advance cybersecurity and ICT governance across Africa through research, policy analysis, and capacity building
